general.name: plateHoles
general.description: Plate Holes Design File with target information for drilled plates

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

header.comment: plate ID number
the hour angle for which each pointing is designed (negative = rising, positive = setting, given in degrees)

the minimum observable hour angle to guarantee no hole offsets due to refraction greater than value given by MAX_OFF_FIBER_FOR_HA header keyword in plateDefaults file (negative = rising, positive = setting, given in degrees)

the maximum observable hour angle to guarantee no hole offsets due to refraction greater than value given by MAX_OFF_FIBER_FOR_HA header keyword in plateDefaults file (negative = rising, positive = setting, given in degrees)
SDSS Program Name for which plate is designed
temperature of design (deg C)
effective plate scale of the design (in altitude direction, mm per deg)
effective plate scale of the design (in azimuth direction, mm per deg)
parallactic angle (deg E of N)
placeholders for guider coefficients, unused
placeholders for guider coefficients, unused
placeholders for guider coefficients, unused

placeholders for guider coefficients, unused
Number identifying the physical location of the plate on the Sky for Apogee
Instruments for which plate is designed
number of pointings that the plate is designed to make; each pointing will correspond to one or more exposures during observation; number must be less than or equal to 6
number of offsets to perform within each exposure
type of Plate guide fibers to assume (old "gfiber" or new "gfiber2")
for each Plate pointing, the source to search for guide fibers from (can be "SDSS" or "2MASS")
for each Plate pointing, the source to search for guide fibers from (can be "SDSS" or "2MASS")
minimum and maximum g-band magnitudes for Plate guide stars (default - [13, 15.5])
Guiding wavelength (in Angstroms)
maximum number of possible plate guide stars to track, otherwise tracks 10s of thousands at low b (default - infinite)
diameter of plate ferrule in mm for BOSS
buffer to include outside boss ferrule for checking for conflicts
diameter of plate ferrule in mm for APOGEE
buffer to include outside apogee ferrule for checking for conflicts
diameter of plate ferrule in mm for guide fibers
buffer to include outside guide ferrule for checking for conflicts
specify what instruments we want plate design to find standards for
for each plate pointing, type of standard to find (can be "SDSS" or "2MASS", or "None" --- in fact, any value other than SDSS or 2MASS is equivalent to "None")
specify what instruments we want plate design to find skies for, if any
for each pointing, type of skies to find (can be "SDSS" or "2MASS")
type of plugmap file to create (default "plplugmap")
type of magnitude used for fiber magnitudes for BOSS targets

header.value: A B C D E F
header.comment: name of the plate pointings ('A B C D E F')
set HA limits (ha_observable_min, haobservable_max) to guarantee no offsets greater than this limit, in arcsec (platedesign v1_27 and above)
oversampling factor for collecting skies and standards; to ensure pluggability, should be at least 5 (default - 5)
plate design identification number
Plate design version used
type of plateDefault file to use
Which mapper leads the plate design (bhmLead or mwmLead). Ony set for plateID>=15072.

priority number assigned by the plateInput file; lower numbers indicate higher priority
for APOGEE, do not break target classes up into bright/medium/faint.
types of targets which the file will specify a certain number of (allowed - "science", "sky", "standard")
Number of apogee standards
Number of apogee science targets
Number of apogee sky targets
Number of boss standards
Number of boss science targets
Number of boss sky targets
specify if we have a minimum number of skies we want to assign per Plate fiber block (default 0)
specify if we have a minimum number of standards we want to assign per Plate fiber block (default 0)

structure.name: holetype
structure.description: type of hole to be drilled; one of SDSS, BOSS, MARVELS, APOGEE, GUIDE, CENTER, TRAP, or ALIGNMENT; this really refers to the instrument to be used, so for example SEGUE targets should be either SDSS or BOSS

structure.name: targettype
structure.description: type of target; one of SCIENCE, STANDARD, or SKY (if holetype is BOSS, SDSS, MARVELS or APOGEE); NA if not holetype is not one of the instruments (GUIDE, CENTER, TRAP, ALIGNMENT)

structure.name: sourcetype
structure.description: indicate the nature of the source, one of STAR, QSO, GALAXY, or NA (if targettype is NA)

structure.name: target_ra
structure.description: right ascension, in J2000 deg

structure.name: target_dec
structure.description: declination, in J2000 deg

structure.name: iplateinput
structure.description: integer indicating which plateInput file from the list in the plateDefinition file this came from (1-indexed); -1 or 0 if the hole wasn't from a plateInput file.

structure.name: pointing
structure.description: which pointing (1-indexed) this target is associated with; note this means which pointing among the ones that this plate is designed for, so if this a single pointing plate but uses the B-side MARVELS fibers, this will be "1", not "2"

structure.name: offset
structure.description: which offset this target is associated with; 0 means it is not associated with an offset, it is associated with the primary pointing

structure.name: fiberid
structure.description: what fiber on the appropriate instrument (as listed in holetype) is assigned to this target (-9999 for none)

structure.name: block
structure.description: which fiber block that fiber is associated with (-9999 for none)

structure.name: iguide
structure.description: for guide holes, which guide fiber it is assigned to (from 1 to 11) (-9999 for non guide holes)

structure.name: xf_default
structure.description: X position of hole in focal plane, given a default set of observing parameters (hour angle of zero, temperature of 5 deg C), in units of mm; for position angle of zero (which we always use), +X is +RA

structure.name: yf_default
structure.description: Y position of hole in focal plane, given a default set of observing parameters (hour angle of zero, temperature of 5 deg C), in units of mm; for position angle of zero (which we always use), +Y is +Dec

structure.name: lambda_eff
structure.description: wavelength to optimize hole location for, in Angstroms (platedesign will default to 5400 if not set)

structure.name: zoffset
structure.description: backstopping offset distance, in microns (platedesign will default to 0 if not set)

structure.name: bluefiber
structure.description: 1 if the BOSS instrument is meant to assign this target a "blue" fiber; 0 otherwise

structure.name: chunk
structure.description: BOSS chunk number (0 if not appropriate)

structure.name: ifinal
structure.description: 0-indexed position in BOSS final tiling file (-1 if not appropriate)

structure.name: origfile
structure.description: for BOSS targets, name of file that target originated within (for BOSS targets, one of the bosstarget files, for ancillary targets, a file within the directory.

structure.name: fileindx
structure.description: for BOSS targets, 0-indexed position within ORIGFILE (-1 if not appropriate)

structure.name: diameter
structure.description: diameter of hole to be drilled

structure.name: buffer
structure.description: buffer to leave around hole edge for conflicts

structure.name: priority
structure.description: priority number assigned by the plateInput file; lower numbers indicate higher priority

structure.name: assigned
structure.description: 1 if this was a target assigned to a fiber, 0 otherwise

structure.name: conflicted
structure.description: 1 if this was a target not assigned because of a collision, 0 otherwise

structure.name: ranout
structure.description: 1 if this was a target not assigned because we ran out of fibers, 0 otherwise

structure.name: outside
structure.description: 1 if this was a target not assigned because it was too fare from the plate center, 0 otherwise

structure.name: mangaid
structure.description: MaNGA identifier

structure.name: ifudesign
structure.description: intended IFU identified for this object

structure.name: ifudesignsize
structure.description: number of fibers in intended IFU identified for this object

structure.name: bundle_size
structure.description: obsolete; used for number of fibers in bundle for MaNGA prototype cartridge, December 2012

structure.name: fiber_size
structure.description: obsolete; used for fiber size (in arcsec) for MaNGA prototype cartridge, December 2012

structure.name: tmass_j
structure.description: 2MASS Point Source Catalog J-band magnitude; Vega-relative; not Galactic extinction corrected; if available

structure.name: tmass_h
structure.description: 2MASS Point Source Catalog H-band magnitude; Vega-relative; not Galactic extinction corrected; if available

structure.name: tmass_k
structure.description: 2MASS Point Source Catalog K-band magnitude; Vega-relative; not Galactic extinction corrected; if available

structure.name: gsc_vmag
structure.description: GSC V-band magnitude; if available

structure.name: tyc_bmag
structure.description: B mag from Tycho2 if available

structure.name: tyc_vmag
structure.description: V mag from Tycho2 if available

structure.name: mfd_mag
structure.description: MARVELS magnitudes for stars in the PRE_SELECTION plates; VT, BT, V, J, H, K

structure.name: usnob_mag
structure.description: USNO-B magnitudes if available

structure.name: source_id
structure.description: Gaia source_id, if available

structure.name: phot_g_mean_mag
structure.description: Gaia G mag, if available

structure.name: sp_param_source
structure.description: source for stellar parameters for MARVELS stars

structure.name: sp_params
structure.description: stellar parameters for MARVELS stars - Teff (K), log10(g), [Fe/H], vsini (km/s)

structure.name: sp_param_err
structure.description: errors in stellar parameters for MARVELS stars

structure.description: bitmask for MARVELS targeting flags

structure.name: marvels_target2
structure.description: bitmask for MARVELS targeting flags

structure.description: bitmask for BOSS targeting flags

structure.name: boss_target2

structure.name: ancillary_target1

structure.description: bitmask for SEGUE-2 targeting flags

structure.description: bitmask for SEGUE-2 targeting flags

structure.name: segueb_target1
structure.description: bitmask for SEGUE-bright targeting flags

structure.name: segueb_target2
structure.description: bitmask for SEGUE-bright targeting flags

structure.name: apogee_target1
structure.description: Apogee Targeting Flag bitmask

structure.name: apogee_target2
structure.description: Apogee Targeting Flag bitmask

structure.description: MaNGA galaxy target flags

structure.name: manga_target2
structure.description: MaNGA non-galaxy target flags

structure.name: manga_target3
structure.description: MaNGA ancillary target flags

structure.name: eboss_target0
structure.description: SEQUELS, TDSS, and SPIDERS target selection flags

structure.name: eboss_target1
structure.description: eBOSS, TDSS, and SPIDERS target selection flags

structure.name: eboss_target2
structure.description: eBOSS, TDSS, and SPIDERS target selection flags

structure.name: eboss_target_id
structure.description: eBOSS unique target identifier for every spectroscopic target

structure.name: thing_id_targeting
structure.description: thing_id value from the version of resolve from which the targeting was created

structure.name: objid_targeting
structure.description: Object ID of target

structure.name: apogee2_target1
structure.description: bitmask for APOGEE 2 targeting flags

structure.name: apogee2_target2
structure.description: bitmask for APOGEE 2 targeting flags

structure.name: apogee2_target3
structure.description: bitmask for APOGEE 2 targeting flags

structure.name: run
structure.description: SDSS imaging run number

structure.name: rerun
structure.description: SDSS imaging rerun identifier

structure.name: camcol
structure.description: SDSS imaging camcol

structure.name: field
structure.description: SDSS imaging field identifier

structure.name: id
structure.description: SDSS imaging identifier

structure.name: psfflux
structure.description: PSF fluxes [ugriz]

structure.name: psfflux_ivar
structure.description: inverse variance of PSF fluxes [ugriz]

structure.name: fiberflux
structure.description: 3 arcsec fiber fluxes [ugriz]

structure.name: fiberflux_ivar
structure.description: 3 arcsec fiber flux inverse variance [ugriz]

structure.name: fiber2flux
structure.description: 2 arcsec fiber fluxes [ugriz]

structure.name: fiber2flux_ivar
structure.description: inverse variance of 2 arcsec fiber fluxes [ugriz]

structure.name: psfmag
structure.description: PSF magnitudes [ugriz]

structure.name: fibermag
structure.description: 3 arcsec fiber magnitudes [ugriz]

structure.name: fiber2mag
structure.description: 2 arcsec fiber magnitudes [ugriz]

structure.name: mag
structure.description: optical magnitudes [ugriz]

structure.name: epoch
structure.description: Epoch of the catalogue coordinates.

structure.name: pmra
structure.description: Proper motion in right ascension

structure.name: pmdec
structure.description: Proper motion in declination

structure.name: targetids
structure.description: free-form, white-space separated list of identifiers

structure.name: ifuid
structure.description: Manga IFU identifier

structure.name: catalogid
structure.description: SDSS-V CatalogID

structure.name: gaia_bp
structure.description: Gaia BP magnitude

structure.name: gaia_rp
structure.description: Gaia RP magnitude

structure.name: gaia_g
structure.description: Gaia G magnitude

structure.name: tmass_id
structure.description: TwoMASS Identifier

structure.name: sdssv_apogee_target0
structure.description: Targeting bitmask for SDSSV-APOGEE

structure.name: sdssv_boss_target0
structure.description: Targeting bitmask for SDSSV-BOSS

structure.name: gri_gaia_transform
structure.description: provenance of photometry in SDSS-V plate design

structure.name: firstcarton
structure.description: Main carton from which this target was drawn

structure.name: xfocal
structure.description: The X value in focal plane coordinates

structure.name: yfocal
structure.description: The Y value in focal plane coordinates
